case_title: JY-LIANG HUANG VS. ANASTASIA MURRAY et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT SERVICE BY POST AND MAIL- SYSTEM ERROR. FILED BY PLAINTIFF HUANG, JY-LIANG SERVED DEC-19-2001, MAIL AS TO DEFENDANT MURRAY, ANASTASIA DOES 1 TO 10
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT MURRAY, ANASTASIA

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MURRAY, ANASTASIA DOES 1 TO 10 THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 40 ALBION STREET #1, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94103, AND ALL TENANTS, SUBTENANTS, NAMED CLAIMANTS, AND OTHER OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES PER CCP 415.46
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HUANG, JY-LIANG AS TO DEFENDANT MURRAY, ANASTASIA DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
